title: chaenorhinum litorale
intro: Chaenorhinum litorale, also known as the small toadflax or Mediterranean toadflax, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Chaenorhinum litorale include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Chaenorhinum litorale include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
